title: woodsia × kansana
intro: Woodsia × kansana, also known as Woodsia kansana, is a hybrid fern species resulting from the intercrossing of Woodsia obtusa and Woodsia ilvensis. The medicinal properties of Woodsia × kansana involve its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and exerting antimicrobial properties. Woodsia × kansana is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which can be used to support urinary health and alleviate associated symptoms.
